hook: Accountability is attractive because it proves you can face reality without collapsing or attacking.
body: A man who can own impact, repair what he can, and keep his dignity is easier to trust deeply.

hook: Avoiding accountability often comes from shame, but the avoidance usually creates more shame later.
body: Owning your part is not humiliation. It is emotional strength under pressure.

hook: Owning your part is not humiliation. It is emotional strength under pressure.
body: Saying you were off and want to do better carries more weight than trying to be untouchable.

hook: Saying you were off and want to do better carries more weight than trying to be untouchable.
body: When you know you missed, name it in plain language before your ego starts bargaining with it.
